sections.name: What is Brawl Stars?
sentences: Brawl Stars is a fast mobile game made by Supercell.
You can play it on your phone for free.
The game has many characters called Brawlers.
Each Brawler has a special attack and a Super power.
Most games are 3 versus 3 players.
Games are short, only 2 to 5 minutes.
You win games to get trophies and unlock new Brawlers.
The game is fun, fast, and easy to learn.

sections.name: How to Play
sentences: Use your left thumb to move your Brawler.
Use your right thumb to shoot at enemies.
Your main attack is your normal shot.
Your Super attack is a special powerful move.
Hit enemies with your main attack to charge your Super.
Work with your team to win the game.
The goal depends on the game mode you play.
Practice to get better and earn more trophies.

sections.name: Game Modes
sentences: Gem Grab is a mode where you collect 10 gems.
Showdown is a battle royale mode. Be the last one standing.
Brawl Ball is like soccer. Score 2 goals to win.
Heist is where you attack the enemy safe.
Bounty is where you collect stars by defeating enemies.
